# SonShip Firelight Camp 2026
> Annual Christian youth retreat organized by Mega Subang CMC and Firelight, helping young people reconnect with God, others, and themselves.

## Event Details
- Dates: August 28–31, 2026
- Venue: Radiant Retreats Site B, Jalan Utama Janda Baik, Kampung Chemperoh, 28750 Bentong, Pahang, Malaysia
- Organizer: CMC Subang (megasubangcmc.org.my)
- Contact: sonship2026@megasubangcmc.org.my
- Capacity: 70 registrants

## Key Pages
- /: Camp overview, mission, topics, and registration CTA
- /about: Mission, story, team, and camp statistics
- /register: Registration form with tiered pricing (RM200 / RM230 / RM280)
- /activities: 12 structured camp activities across devotion, sports, arts, and team-building

## Camp Topics
- BGR (Boy-Girl Relationships)
- AI & Faith
- The Prodigal Son Parable

## Languages
- Chinese (Simplified) — primary
- English — available via language toggle
